log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Siren — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):5+1=6 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):12+1=13 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 3/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Siren — Winged Striker: FAIL! 22 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Siren — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Siren — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:3+3=6 vs AC 14] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Siren — Winged Striker.
→ Siren — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:17+6=23 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
